---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

## Elena Ballante

**Assistant Professor in Statistics**  
Department of Political and Social Sciences  
University of Pavia

**Email:** [elena.ballante@unipv.it](mailto:elena.ballante@unipv.it)

## Profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=it&user=ylN4I_AAAAAJ)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3217-8930)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/eballante)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elena-ballante-1b3bb8102/)
